initial_hook: You stand before 'The Whispering Tankard,' a weathered tavern at the edge of the Wildwood. Smoke curls from the chimney, and the smell of roasting meat and stale ale wafts through the door.

tavern.name: The Whispering Tankard Tavern
tavern.description: A smoky, dimly lit tavern. Barnaby the Barkeep stands behind the counter.

npc.name: Barnaby
npc.title: the Barkeep
npc.description: A burly man with a scarred apron and a friendly but watchful eye.

inventory.name: Dwarven Stout
inventory.description: Restores 5 HP but gives -1 Perception for 2 turns.

npc.secret: Barnaby respects a person who pays their tab and speaks plainly.

forest_clearing.name: Sun-Dappled Grove
forest_clearing.description: A peaceful clearing where the light filters through the leaves in golden shafts.

npc.name: Silas
npc.title: the Exiled Knight
npc.description: A man in polished but dented plate armor resting by a stream.

animal.name: Stray Hound
animal.description: A thin, rib-exposed dog watching you hopefully.

swamp_outskirts.name: The Murky Bend
swamp_outskirts.description: Where the forest meets the rot of the swamp.

npc.name: Vex
npc.title: the Cutpurse
npc.description: A hooded figure sharpening a blade on a whetstone. She looks like she's looking for trouble.

traits: Fey Ancestry: Resistance to being charmed.
Stonecunning: Advantage on History checks related to stonework.
Lucky: Reroll natural 1s on attack rolls/saves.
Brave: Advantage on saves against being frightened.
Nimble: Can move through the space of larger creatures.

Fire Bolt.description: Hurl a mote of fire at a creature.

Mage Hand.description: A spectral, floating hand appears at a point you choose within range.

Prestidigitation.description: Perform minor magical tricks for 1 hour.

Magic Missile.description: Three glowing darts of magical force hit unerringly.

Cure Wounds.description: A creature you touch regains hit points.

Shield.description: An invisible barrier of magical force appears and protects you (+5 AC).

Detect Magic.description: Senses the presence of magic within 30 feet.

Sleep.description: This spell sends creatures into a magical slumber.

Far Sight.description: Gaze into the distance, revealing distant locations on your map.

Feather Fall.description: Slow your rate of descent, preventing fall damage.
